---
name: 'Security report'
about: 'Report a security vulnerability privately'
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: ['security']
assignees: []
---

Thank you for reporting a potential security issue. Please do NOT include sensitive information (passwords, private keys) in this report.

Please provide the following details to help us triage:

- Summary of the issue:
- Product / component affected (e.g., api-gateway, dashboard):
- Steps to reproduce / proof of concept:
- Expected vs actual behavior:
- Impact (data exposure, RCE, DoS, etc.):
- Suggested mitigation (if any):
- Your contact email (we may follow up for additional details):

We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and follow up with next steps.
